mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.route_title_zh, r.pic_url
, fav.favorite_flg
FROM yy_route r JOIN ( SELECT target_id FROM yy_user_favorite WHERE target_kbn='03' AND favorite_flg='1' AND user_id = #{customerId} ) t ON r.id = t.target_id
left outer join yy_user_favorite fav on r.id = fav.target_id and target_kbn = '03' and user_type = '01' and user_id = #{customerId}
